backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user management (register, update, delete, get profile), custom links CRUD, and vault notes storage with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to their titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs for tracking implementation requirements across the frontend.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a quick-reference index of what each component, hook, page, and utility does.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the AstraVault SPA, mounting the React app at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for `/login`, `/`, `/vault`, and `/settings`; uses a ref-based settled flag in `RootLayout` to avoid re-showing the initialization loader on brief re-init flashes.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Collapsible sidebar component rendering navigation links, categorized default and custom links with expand/collapse toggles, and an '+ Add Link' button that opens `CustomLinkManager`.
frontend/src/components/CustomLinkManage: Modal component for managing custom links with list, add, and edit modes, supporting icon picking, category selection, and CRUD operations via React Query hooks.
Simple footer component displaying developer credit and a tagline with military-themed styling.
Top navigation header with sidebar toggle, logo, secure connection indicator, and a profile dropdown menu supporting logout functionality.
Main dashboard layout composing the header, collapsible sidebar, background-textured main content area with router outlet, and footer.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountCon: Alert dialog modal requiring the user to type 'DELETE' to confirm permanent account deletion, then clears the query cache and identity on success.
frontend/src/components/IconPicker.tsx: Grid-based icon picker with search filtering that lets users select an icon from the available icon map, highlighting the currently selected icon.
frontend/src/components/LogoutConfirmati: Simple alert dialog modal asking the user to confirm logout before invoking the provided onConfirm callback.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Full-screen modal form for new user registration, collecting name, username, email, and vault password with validation and hashed password submission via React Query.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that checks authentication, actor readiness, and profile state, rendering full-page loaders, an error screen, or a profile setup modal as appropriate before rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/data/defaultLinks.ts: Defines static default quick-link data organized into categories (Banking, Email, Investment, Services, Payments) along with a Lucide icon map and available icon name list.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query-based hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating and refetching all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorReady.ts: A hook that returns `isActorReady` true only after initialization has settled, the identity is non-anonymous, and the actor is available, using a ref to prevent readiness resets during brief re-initialization flashes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage ICP AuthClient lifecycle, login, logout, and identity state with delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, covering profile CRUD, custom links CRUD, and vault notes CRUD, each gated on actor readiness.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Rajdhani and Inter fonts, defines Tailwind base/component/utility layers, and sets up a dark military-themed design system with custom CSS tokens for colors, surfaces, and component styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page displaying a welcome banner, stat cards for default links, custom links, and vault notes, plus quick-access navigation items.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, showing branding, feature badges, and redirecting authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page allowing users to update their profile, change vault password, toggle email 2FA, and delete their account.
frontend/src/pages/VaultPage.tsx: Vault page for managing encrypted notes, supporting unlock/lock with password, add/edit/delete notes using AES-256-GCM encryption, and vault password reset.
frontend/src/utils/encryption.ts: Provides AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt functions for notes using PBKDF2 key derivation, and a SHA-256 password hashing utility via the Web Crypto API.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining a military-themed design system with dark mode support, custom colors (gold accents, military greens, dark surfaces), zero border-radius, custom shadows, fonts (Rajdhani, Inter), and animations including accordion and gold pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 31) describing AstraVault, a military-themed secure dashboard with React/Vite/TypeScript frontend and Node.js/Express/MongoDB backend, documenting architectural decisions, existing features, and known issues like infinite profile spinner and broken login page.
